sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Global Select Equity ETF Global Select Equity ETF
feed.summary: This page provides a detailed profile of the JPMorgan Global Select Equity ETF (JGLO), including its price, dividend information, expense ratio, holdings, and performance metrics. It also offers analysis on its ESG scores, geographic and sector allocations, and various technical indicators, serving as a comprehensive resource for potential investors and financial professionals.

feed.title: Republic Services Reports Strong 2025 Growth Amid Pricing Discipline
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. reported robust financial performance for the 2025 fiscal year, with total revenue reaching $16.591 billion due to strong pricing power and cost management. The company achieved a 3.5% increase in revenue, adjusted EBITDA of $5.31 billion, and adjusted free cash flow growth of 11.5% to $2.43 billion. For 2026, Republic Services projects revenue between $17.05 billion and $17.15 billion, anticipating continued growth despite a slight decline in volume.

feed.title: After 45 Days, I Figured Out Exactly Who the MacBook Neo Is For
feed.summary: The author clarifies that the new MacBook Neo, Apple's cheapest laptop at $599, is not aimed at tech column readers or "ecosystem" users. Instead, it's designed for first-time Mac buyers and those who view computers as simple appliances for basic tasks. The device's unexpected success and stock shortages demonstrate Apple's strong understanding of market fit for budget-conscious consumers.

feed.title: Teradyne Inc. stock (US8807701029): Why its semiconductor testing leadership matters more now for in
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. is a critical player in the semiconductor industry, providing automated test equipment essential for AI, automotive, and mobile chip production. The company's leadership in precision testing, diversified business segments, and strong financial performance make it an attractive long-term investment. Despite competition, Teradyne's innovation and exposure to secular trends like AI chip demand and automotive electrification position it well for future growth in the chip-dependent future.

feed.title: Caterpillar Stock: The 43x P/E Data Center Trap (NYSE:CAT)
feed.summary: Caterpillar's operating margins contracted in 2025 despite revenue growth, which the author suggests could signal a peak-cycle. The company returned more cash to shareholders than it generated in free cash flow, funding buybacks. With a high trailing P/E of 43.0x, the author believes the stock is overvalued and predicts a significant downside to a fair value near $350 based on mean-reversion models.

feed.title: Did Extending Debt Maturities and Expanding Credit Lines Just Shift Quaker Chemical's (KWR) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Quaker Houghton recently amended its credit agreement, extending debt maturities to 2031 and expanding its credit facilities to $800 million. This move is expected to enhance financial flexibility for growth, acquisitions, and cost-saving initiatives, while also addressing refinancing risks. However, the article notes that investors should still consider Quaker Houghton's elevated leverage and interest costs, and that the immediate focus for the company remains on execution against earnings expectations and margin stability.

feed.title: Axon Enterprise Inc. stock (US05464C1018): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly changes how investors access information on stocks like Axon Enterprise Inc. (AXON), prioritizing personalized, mobile-first content based on user activity. This shift delivers tailored insights on public safety tech trends directly to Google app feeds, enabling faster decision-making for retail investors. The update emphasizes high-quality, E-E-A-T content, making Axon's hardware and SaaS business model more discoverable and amplifying its visibility in a growing market.

feed.title: Coca-Cola, Colgate-Palmolive, and PepsiCo: Dividend Growth Stocks for 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: This article highlights Coca-Cola, Colgate-Palmolive, and PepsiCo as strong dividend growth stocks for 2026, emphasizing their status as "Dividend Kings" due to decades of consistent dividend increases. Coca-Cola boasts 64 years of dividend growth with projected 7% annual earnings growth, while Colgate-Palmolive has a 63-year streak and a strong brand portfolio. PepsiCo is also noted for its brand recognition and global scale, positioning it for continued dividend delivery.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive news about Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044) on mobile devices. This update prioritizes personalized, proactive financial content, delivering insights into Northern Trust's asset servicing and wealth management directly to users' feeds, thereby enabling faster market decisions. The shift emphasizes mobile-first, scannable formats from credible publishers to keep investors informed on key metrics and strategic developments without needing to actively search.

feed.title: FactSet appoints Joshua Warren CFO as Helen Shan departs
feed.summary: FactSet has appointed Joshua Warren as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective immediately. Warren previously served as FactSet's Senior Vice President, Head of Investor Relations and Treasurer. He succeeds Helen Shan, who is departing from her position.
